workshop_title: Design Thinking and UX Research for Product Managers

pre_event_setup.task: Confirm venue power strip availability (1 per 2 seats) to ensure all 12 laptops can be charged.
pre_event_setup.notes: Venue only provides 0.5 outlets per seat; extension cords are mandatory.

pre_event_setup.task: Finalize and print all workshop materials (Agendas, Interview Guides, Persona Cards, Feedback Templates).
pre_event_setup.notes: No on-site printer; must be brought in hard copy.

pre_event_setup.task: Verify Miro board permissions and test access from a non-company network.
pre_event_setup.notes: Ensure all templates are duplicated and ready for 12 users.

venue_readiness.task: Test Wi-Fi stability for 12 simultaneous users.
venue_readiness.notes: Check for latency during Miro board loading.

venue_readiness.task: Configure room layout to allow for pair-work and small group movement.
venue_readiness.notes: Open plan space requires clear separation to minimize noise during interviews.

attendee_communications.notes: Include: Miro login verification, request to close non-essential apps, and bring laptop chargers.

action_items: Instructor delivers: Welcome and Design Thinking Foundations
Instructor delivers: Empathise: Research Planning and Interviewing

day_of_runsheet.module: Define: Affinity Mapping and HMW Statements
action_items: Instructor delivers: Define: Affinity Mapping and HMW Statements
